title: Retro Songs
desc: Embark on a nostalgic journey with a 100-song nonstop retro collection, featuring timeless classics that gently transport you back to music's golden era of memories.

title: Ninaithaley Inikkum
desc: Kamal Hassan, a touring singer, falls for Jayaprada in Singapore, while Rajnikanth chases a fan message. Jayaprada reveals cancer, longs to perform, and dies tragically.

title: Red Carpet
desc: This project highlights women everywhere by sharing inspiring series, honest talks, short films, and meaningful entertainment that celebrate their voices, journeys, and power and resilience.

title: Rajavin Paarvaiyilae

desc: A son copes with his father's death and reflects on their bond as it shapes his growth, love, hardship, and daring journeys through adolescence and adulthood alike.

title: En Thangai
desc: Rajendran, breadwinner, is robbed by his uncle after patriarch's disappearance; Meena goes blind, tensions rise, Suriyamoorthy helps, but tragedy ends with them vanishing at sea.

title: Penn
desc: Ranganayaki, a powerful businesswoman, welcomes Deepa into the empire. Her children Bharani and Karthik, with driver Kasi, witness a temple river rescue and hospital admission.

title: Vaarayo Vennilavey
desc: A woman comes for money, and she gets money. Yet love wins, guiding her heart and choices, proving money's power fades beside genuine love alone.

title: Saathanai Pengal
desc: Director Sivaji seeks a real Anarkali; Nalini's daughter Bhuvani becomes the new Anarkali, while Prabhu falls in love, but both die from poison.

title: Vijaya
desc: Vijay, carefree, hires Selvam from a senior home to pretend to be his father for business deal. Over time, they help each other and grow.
